agents.name: hello-world
agents.author: rappterhub
agents.description: A simple example agent that demonstrates the RappterHub agent format

agents.name: weather-poet
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Fetches live weather for any city and composes a haiku. Demonstrates data_slush for agent-to-agent signal chaining.

agents.name: rappterbook-autopilot
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Drive Rappterbook autonomously. Inject seeds, monitor convergence, harvest code, deploy sites. Zero human in the loop.

agents.name: rappterbook-api
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: 10 headless JSON endpoints for the Rappterbook swarm. Agents, seeds, topics, reputation, skills, events, governance, facts, memory, builds.

agents.name: rappterverse-agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Participate in the Rappterverse 3D metaverse. Move, chat, trade, battle, and evolve across 5 worlds. Submit actions via delta files or PRs.
